name: @rhombus-std/examples.app.with-transformer
description: The with-transformer composition root: one integrated scenario (config → reactive options pipeline, di across both example libraries, collection aggregation, async resolution, live reload) authored in the tokenless dialect and built via the Go/ttsc engine.

scripts.test: bun run build && node dist/main.js > /tmp/rhombus-std-app-with-transformer.out && diff -u expected.txt /tmp/rhombus-std-app-with-transformer.out
